programme.title: Next Stop Ep212: Iceland
programme.desc: Join host Jon Olson as he rafts rapids with Arctic Adventures, takes us on a Reykjavik Downtown Walking Tour, catches a rare look inside a volcano, explores the world famous Blue Lagoon and enjoys the music of Jon Jonsson.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: Sumatra - In Search of Perfect Waves
programme.desc: A key component of The Surfing Lifestyle is to venture to lesser travelled parts of the world in search of perfect waves, and Dru Adler, Adam Bennetts and their surfboard shaper Daniel MacDonald, did exactly that in southern Sumatra where they found uncrowded perfection and adventure around every turn.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep111: Sand Tiger Sharks as Protectors
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV demonstrates how Sand Tiger Sharks act as protectors and takes a Deeper Dive by explaining male vs female shark differences, shark reproduction, Gray Reef Sharks and shark buoyancy.

programme.title: Let’s Take It Outside Ep110: A High Adrenaline Vacation – St Pete-Clearwater, Florida
programme.desc: We take over Pinellas County, Florida...flying, zipping, racing and soaring at high speeds. Burning rubber, and our taste buds, on the hottest Hot Wing challenge in the State.

programme.title: Blue World Ep304: Friendly Sea Lions in the Galapagos Islands + Humpback Whales in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Blue World visits the Galapagos Islands to play with friendly sea lions, and then we travel to the Caribbean to film Humpback Whales.

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Adventures in Tygart Lake State Park – Grafton, West Virginia
programme.desc: We visit Tygart Lake State Park in Grafton, West Virginia, for fishing, camping, hiking, boating and more. This episode is unique in that it showcases the Park in all four seasons of the year.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep227: European Windsurfing Championships + Moomba Masters + Powerboat World Championships
programme.desc: European Windsurfing Championships from Mallorca, Spain + Nacra 17 Asian Sailing Championships from Shanghai, China + Moomba Masters Invitational Wakeboarding Waterskiing Championships from Melbourne, Australia + VoomQuest UIM V2 Powerboat World Championships from Malta.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep212: Iceland
programme.desc: Join host Jon Olson as he rafts rapids with Arctic Adventures, takes us on a Reykjavik Downtown Walking Tour, catches a rare look inside a volcano, explores the world famous Blue Lagoon and enjoys the music of Jon Jonsson.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: Sumatra - In Search of Perfect Waves
programme.desc: A key component of The Surfing Lifestyle is to venture to lesser travelled parts of the world in search of perfect waves, and Dru Adler, Adam Bennetts and their surfboard shaper Daniel MacDonald, did exactly that in southern Sumatra where they found uncrowded perfection and adventure around every turn.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep213: Fort Lauderdale, Florida
programme.desc: In the Season 2 finale, host Steven Bull checks out the Fort Lauderdale International Boat Show, the Manitoba Marine Museum and gives Silent Film a try.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Motherload
programme.desc: The hardest part of any adventure is getting out the door. Planning is tedious. Packing is time consuming. Once on-hill, everything falls into place. Follow pro skiers Izzy Lynch and Tessa Treadway as they carry the load of life changing events and the love of their children into the mountains.

programme.title: The Ghost Ski Resorts - Fortress
programme.desc: Deep in the Rockies stands Fortress Mountain. From the late 1960s through the 1980s, this landmark ski area buzzed with activity. Today, it is a quiet thing of abandoned beauty. Skiers Mark Abma and Callum Pettit explore the past and ponder the future of this once iconic Alberta destination.

programme.title: The Ghost Ski Resorts - Ski Rio
programme.desc: In January 2000, Ski Rio closed one night. The resort has remained dormant ever since. It’s no stretch to compare Ski Rio’s snow covered lodgings to the Overlook Hotel in the cult classic thriller The Shining. Just like in the film, the innkeeper Joe Musich admits his job can get a little spooky.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 13: The Groomer Crow - Bernie Rosow
programme.desc: Do you despise your office job? If so, Episode 13 offers the truth, the way, and the light. Bernie Rosow could neither consider a life without skiing, nor skiing without the freedom of skiing. Now a snowcat operator, his night shift allows him to solve the equation and to freeski every day, freely.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 14: Tony Deano - Ski Bums Forever
programme.desc: In Episode 14, we honor our friends Tony Stadler and Deano Dacas. Before Black Crows was ever conceived, we were skiing for years with these two. And we will keep on skiing with them, whatever happens. We are the ski bum crows brotherhood forever.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 15: Gabriella Palko
programme.desc: Gabby Palko is living what many skiers would call a dream life. From her sailboat in the Port of Valdez, she is able to ski the Alaskan mountains as often as she likes. In this emotional documentary, she connects the dots between the two parts of her life, broken by the long illness of her father.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: Wavy 2
programme.desc: After filming WAVY, director Nikolai Schirmer promised himself that he would never set foot on a ship again. Find out how he ended up off the coast of Svalbard with an excited rookie, a contemptuous captain, and a reformed drug addict, in this thrilling and often comical ski adventure documentary.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: La Sentinelle - The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Bruno Compagnet and Camille Jaccoux are friends and co-founders of Black Crows, the iconic ski brand, and La Sentinelle, the renown ski touring event. Two passionate practitioners in conversation, always seeking the wild, beautiful, and natural side of the mountain.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 1 - LAAX
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with Absinthe Films and the legendary professional snowboarders Nicolas Müller and Wolfgang Nyvelt as they score epic powder at Laax Resort in Switzerland. Nicolas shows the crew around his home terrain, hitting up big hits and dreamy powder fields.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 2 - LAAX
programme.desc: In episode 2 of the Absinthe Films Flipside series, Nicolas Müller and Wolfgang Nyvelt continue exploring Nicolas’ backyard, the Laax Resort in Switzerland. With snow this deep, the mountain is an endless playground.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 3 - LAAX
programme.desc: Snowboarders always have secret stashes. This is especially true for Nicolas Müller. Watch as the Laax local takes Wolle Nyvelt to his favorite spots on the mountain. If you like perfect jumps high above the clouds, powder landings, frontside 1080s, and beautiful sunsets, this episode is for you.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 4 - ARLBERG
programme.desc: In 2012, snowboarder Danny Kass captured his debut part with Absinthe Films. To begin, Kass met up with Eric Jackson in Gigi Rüf’s hometown of Arlberg, Austria. While there, a war broke out between the film crew and the locals. Watch as Gigi steps in to keep the peace.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 5 - ARLBERG
programme.desc: Danny Kass, Gigi Rüf, and Wolle Nyvelt meet up in Arlberg, Austria. The crew spends the day fine-tuning their jump and bagging a perfect bluebird session. Danny puts down his first 720 of the year. Gigi takes a heavy slam trying backside double corks. But wait, there’s more! Drama ensues!

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 7 - SAAS FEE
programme.desc: The superhuman Danny Kass and legendary Nicolas Müller reunite with the Absinthe Films crew in Switzerland. From the word “GO!,” the guys score epic powder conditions. Nico goes off slashing. Danny locks down the biggest backflip of his life.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 8 - SAAS FEE
programme.desc: In this episode of Flipside, Danny Kass flips a coin in Saas Fee. Tails he stays in Switzerland. Heads he goes home. Switzerland it is! Now on a solo mission, Kass stacks clips for the cameras of Absinthe Films director Patrick Armbruster. This is Danny Kass at his best.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Resonance
programme.desc: Resonance stands as a defining Absinthe Films classic, shot across Japan, Switzerland, and Alaska. Featuring Gigi Rüf, Nicolas Müller, Lucas Debari, Danny Kass, Annie Boulanger, Scotty Lago, Bode Merrill, and more in peak form.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Danny Kass - Dose 01
programme.desc: Danny Kass changed snowboarding at a crucial time. Here is how it all began. Starring Danny Kass and the Grenerds.

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to The Polo Show. The program about the most spectacular horse events all around. programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 2
programme.desc: Today we bring you some of the highlights from the season finale in the USA as well as the start of the season in England. programme.title: Domestic Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Julia are a couple with dark secrets. Blanca is a tortured soul with a past. And Olivia is hellbent on finding the truth. When these four lives intersect, nobody escapes. Bonds are tested; wills are broken; and, metal is forged. It's a tale of survival, trust, and darkness from the creators of Bloody Drama.

programme.title: Satan Claus
programme.desc: With the clock ticking and the body count rising, Homicide Detective Timothy Reynolds reluctantly volunteers to assist his former partner, Detective Alan Fryer, with the investigation to a slew of grisly murders left behind by a mission orientated killer during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Beware the Boogeyman
programme.desc: Dr. Tristian Mackenzie makes her way to a Psychiatric Hospital for the criminally insane, where she learns of the strange series of cases from Dr. Moon.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E01 - Diana A Portrait
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E43 - Diana A Day In The Life
programme.desc: When Diana got engaged, she was constantly in the media's eyes. Throughout her life, she focused on her sons and committed herself to charity work, like speaking out against land mines. Diana used her fame to bring attention to this and other important issues. This well-researched show takes a closer look at one of the 20th century's most amazing people. With never-before-seen footage, it shows her path from a shy teen to becoming the beloved Diana, Princess of Wales, including touching moments from her last days.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: Experience an in-depth look at Princess Diana, the extraordinary woman of the 20th century. Featuring unique interviews and touching clips, this portrait captures her incredible journey to fame and her ability to overcome the emotional and physical challenges she encountered nearly every day.

programme.title: Forces
programme.desc: Under the crushing emotional burden of his terminally ill father and violent brother, 14-year-old Daniel seeks refuge with two outcasts.

programme.title: Talk to Me

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: It Works In Reverse

programme.title: Breaking The Bondage Of Wrong Belief
programme.desc: The belief that we need something other than God is what keeps us from going through breakthroughs. That’s how we can be in covenant with God but still in captivity. In “Breaking The Bondage Of Wrong Belief,” Pastor Steven Furtick helps us break up with what’s been holding us back.

programme.title: This Is What A Miracle Feels Like
programme.desc: Sometimes, a miracle feels like you’re free, but you’re still running. Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us to look for signs that God is at work when our feelings haven’t caught up to our reality in “This Is What A Miracle Feels Like.”

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Paulina defends Elvis, calling Virginia a slut, and even doubts that the baby she is expecting is her son. Alberto informs Lorena of Patricia's decision not to pursue her case. Marco Aurelio tells Lorena that now he is the one who needs a favor from her, and asks her to find out from her ex-partner who the intellectual authors of her attacks are. Lorena is tense and scared, because she knows their names very well: Gertrudis and Claudio.

Guillermo tells Lorena that he will take care of raising Ignacio from now on. Lorena, unable to cope with the pressure she is under, yells at Guillermo that she cannot kill anyone and asks him to free her from this responsibility that does not belong to her. Patricia confesses to Alberto that she loves him.

Max no logra superar su resentimiento por el desprecio y la humillación que le hizo Camila. La verdadera razón por la cual no pudieron casarse, está escrita en el cuaderno que Rosa envió.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila le exige a Marcelina que le confiese lo que decían las cartas que mandó a quemar. Ante tanta presión ésta cuenta lo que para inculpar a Rosa Blanco. Max

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto contrata a Antón, un delincuente, para asesinar a Rosa Blanco; Camila y Max, felices, cuentan al Padre Tiziano, sobre su próxima boda. Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila explica a Ezequiel y Julia el motivo de su felicidad: se casará con Max, y también pronto se reunirá con su madre. Por medio de Luciano, Rosa le envía la dirección donde van a encontrarse, pero Elda, rabiosa, copia los datos y los revela al Inspector Torrealba que ordena un operativo policial para detenerla.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila divisa una mujer que corresponde a la descripción de su mamá. Antón, el sicario, también está allí y armado se dirige a ellas. Torrealba ordena a sus hombres correr hacia las mujeres, agarran a Camila y se llevan a la mujer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Morirse En Domingo
programme.desc: Julio Salas muere tras una larga enfermedad, pero es domingo y su familia por dificultades económicas se ve forzada a contratar los servicios de una modesta agencia funeraria.

programme.title: Hienas
programme.desc: Luis ha metido la pata... hasta el fondo. Pero Pepe está ahí para ayudarlo... a caer. Ninguno de los dos tenía idea del grandísimo lío en el que andaban metidos ya desde hacía tiempo. Una liada de cojones.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.title: El Tercer Deseo
programme.desc: Eugenio, un corredor de bienes raíces despierta en una esquina de la ciudad con una descomunal borrachera y descubre cerca una desportillada tetera de metal. La toma y manosea a ver si es de plata y, de pronto, se le aparece el espectro de un duende que le sugiere formule tres deseos. El genio desaparece sin dar oportunidad al tercer deseo. Mas tarde, descubre que los deseos le han sido concedidos pero de forma equivocada. La vida de Eugenio se complica, solo anhela reencontrar la tetera abandonada y pedir el tercer deseo.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: ¡Ni Te Me Acerques!
programme.desc: Él solo tenía que cuidar el hotel y teclear su novela, como Jack Nicholson en “El Resplandor”, pero de buen rollo. Y Llega la cuarentena y se queda le pilla en el Hotel Balneario de Ariño haciendo frente a la paranoia general, el acoso de las fuerzas del orden, las videollamadas de su novia, su madre y del conspiranoico Javi... Todos nos aburrimos mucho en el primer confinamiento. Juan no.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
